---
title: "Lele Liao"
image: "files/Lele_Winter.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
---

Welcome to my website!

## Featured Projects

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<a href="./projects/ABTest/hw1_questions.html" class="feature-card-link">
<div class="feature-card">
<h3>🧸 A/B Testing with Chiikawa</h3>
<p>
A simple and visual guide to frequentist statistics using an A/B test on website sign-ups.
</p>
<span class="card-link">View Project →</span>
</div>
</a>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<a href="./projects/HousingMarket/" class="feature-card-link">
<div class="feature-card">
<h3>📊 Housing Market Dashboard</h3>
<p>
Explore how income influences housing and rental prices.
</p>
<span class="card-link">View Dashboard →</span>
</div>
</a>
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
<a href="./projects/Research/hw2_questions.html" class="feature-card-link">
<div class="feature-card">
<h3>📖 Minimum Wage Study</h3>
<p>
Replication of Card & Krueger (1994) using DID analysis.
</p>
<span class="card-link">View Project →</span>
</div>
</a>
:::

:::
